failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch results and selected the last item in the ascending-price list instead of the first item. The correct cheapest available Electric Kettle was 1240311797 at $137.17, not 2243454707 at $164.46.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The required tool call was made correctly at index 3, and the tool output clearly returned available electric kettles sorted by ascending price. The first item was item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, making it the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which was actually the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This is not an invalid tool invocation or underspecified intent; it is an incorrect interpretation of the relevant tool output.
